# Law

- [HB 110 (2021), Sections 610.115 and 757.40](hb-110-2021.md) - The 2021 budget bill's municipal income tax provisions - enrolled bill and LSC analysis links, with the operative language on 2021 withholding and employee refunds quoted verbatim.
